---
name: Feature Request
about: A new capability or enhancement to be added to the library
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Summary

A clear description of the proposed capability.

## Motivation

Why is this needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed approach.

## DDD Layer

Which layer does this affect?

- [ ] `domain/` — Entity, Value Object, Aggregate Root, Domain Event, Domain Service, Specification
- [ ] `application/` — Command, Query, Bus, Unit of Work
- [ ] `infrastructure/` — Repository implementations, Event Store adapters
- [ ] `es/` — Event-sourced aggregates, Projections
